en: Now a man from the house of Levi went and took as his wife a Levite woman.
zh: 有一個利未家的人去娶了一個利未女子為妻。

en: The woman conceived and bore a son, and when she saw that he was a fine child, she hid him three months.
zh: 那女人懷孕，生了一個兒子；見他俊美，就把他藏了三個月。

en: When she could hide him no longer, she took for him a basket made of bulrushes and daubed it with bitumen and pitch. She put the child in it and placed it among the reeds by the river bank.
zh: 直到她不能把他再藏了，就拿一個蒲草箱來，塗上瀝青和石漆；把孩子放在裡面，把箱子放在河邊的蘆葦叢中。

en: And his sister stood at a distance to know what would be done to him.
zh: 孩子的姊姊遠遠地站著，要知道孩子究竟怎樣。

en: Now the daughter of Pharaoh came down to bathe at the river, while her young women walked beside the river. She saw the basket among the reeds and sent her servant woman, and she took it.
zh: 那時，法老的女兒下到河邊去洗澡；她的使女們在河邊行走；她看見了在蘆葦中的箱子，就打發自己的使女去把箱子拿過來。

en: When she opened it, she saw the child, and behold, the baby was crying. She took pity on him and said, "This is one of the Hebrews' children."
zh: 她打開了，就看見那孩子；看哪，孩子哭了，她就憐憫他，說：“這是希伯來人的一個孩子。”

en: Then his sister said to Pharaoh's daughter, "Shall I go and call you a nurse from the Hebrew women to nurse the child for you?"
zh: 孩子的姊姊對法老的女兒說：“我去從希伯來婦人中給你請一個奶媽來，為你乳養這個孩子可以嗎？”

en: And Pharaoh's daughter said to her, "Go." So the girl went and called the child's mother.
zh: 法老的女兒回答：“你去吧。”童女就去把孩子的母親請了來。

en: And Pharaoh's daughter said to her, "Take this child away and nurse him for me, and I will give you your wages." So the woman took the child and nursed him.
zh: 法老的女兒對她說：“你把這孩子抱去，替我乳養他，我必給你工錢。”婦人就抱了孩子去乳養他。

en: When the child grew up, she brought him to Pharaoh's daughter, and he became her son. She named him Moses, "Because," she said, "I drew him out of the water."
zh: 孩子長大了，婦人把他帶到法老的女兒那裡，他就作了法老女兒的兒子。她給孩子起名叫摩西，說：“因為我把他從水裡拉出來。”

en: One day, when Moses had grown up, he went out to his people and looked on their burdens, and he saw an Egyptian beating a Hebrew, one of his people.
zh: 過了些日子，摩西長大了，有一次，他出去到他的同胞那裡去，看見他們的重擔，又看見一個埃及人打他的一個同胞希伯來人。

en: He looked this way and that, and seeing no one, he struck down the Egyptian and hid him in the sand.
zh: 摩西左右觀望，見沒有人，就把那埃及人擊殺了，埋藏在沙土裡。

en: When he went out the next day, behold, two Hebrews were struggling together. And he said to the man in the wrong, "Why do you strike your companion?"
zh: 第二天他又出去，看見兩個希伯來人彼此爭鬥著，就對那欺負人的說：“你為甚麼打你同族的人呢？”

en: He answered, "Who made you a prince and a judge over us? Do you mean to kill me as you killed the Egyptian?" Then Moses was afraid, and thought, "Surely the thing is known."
zh: 那人回答：“誰立了你作我們的領袖和審判官呢？難道你想殺我，好像殺那個埃及人一樣嗎？”摩西就懼怕起來，心裡想：“這事必定給人知道了！”

en: When Pharaoh heard of it, he sought to kill Moses. But Moses fled from Pharaoh and stayed in the land of Midian. And he sat down by a well.
zh: 法老聽見這事，就設法要殺摩西；摩西躲避法老，就往米甸地去居住；有一天他坐在井旁。

en: Now the priest of Midian had seven daughters, and they came and drew water and filled the troughs to water their father's flock.
zh: 米甸的祭司有七個女兒，她們來打水，打滿了水槽，要給父親的羊群喝。

en: The shepherds came and drove them away, but Moses stood up and saved them, and watered their flock.
zh: 有些牧人來了，把她們趕走；摩西卻起來，救了她們，也給她們的羊群喝水。

en: When they came home to their father Reuel, he said, "How is it that you have come home so soon today?"
zh: 她們回到父親流珥那裡，父親問：“今天你們為甚麼趕著回來呢？”

en: They said, "An Egyptian delivered us out of the hand of the shepherds and even drew water for us and watered the flock."
zh: 她們說：“有一個埃及人救我們脫離了牧羊人的手，而且還為我們打水給羊群喝。”

en: He said to his daughters, "Then where is he? Why have you left the man? Call him, that he may eat bread."
zh: 父親對眾女兒說：“他在哪裡？你們為甚麼撇下那人呢？去請他來吃飯。”

en: And Moses was content to dwell with the man, and he gave Moses his daughter Zipporah.
zh: 摩西樂意和那人同住；那人把自己的女兒西坡拉給了摩西作妻子。

en: She gave birth to a son, and he called his name Gershom, for he said, "I have been a sojourner in a foreign land."
zh: 西坡拉生了一個兒子，摩西給他起名叫革舜，因為他說：“我在異地作了客旅。”

en: During those many days the king of Egypt died, and the people of Israel groaned because of their slavery and cried out for help. Their cry for rescue from slavery came up to God.
zh: 過了很久，埃及王死了。以色列人在捆鎖中歎息，他們就呼求，在捆鎖中的呼求達到 神那裡。

en: And God heard their groaning, and God remembered his covenant with Abraham, with Isaac, and with Jacob.
zh: 神聽見他們的呼聲，就記念他與亞伯拉罕、以撒、雅各所立的約。

en: God saw the people of Israel- and God knew.
zh: 神看顧以色列人，也關注他們。
